name: color/cyan/190
description: Brand-extension hue (cyan). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe success/info. Shade 190 — tint — subtle background hue.

name: color/cyan/200
description: Brand-extension hue (cyan). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe success/info. Shade 200 — lightest extreme.

name: color/yellow/0
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 0 — darkest extreme.

name: color/yellow/10
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 10 — near-dark / OLED-safe deep.

name: color/yellow/25
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 25 — deep — high-emphasis text on light.

name: color/yellow/50
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 50 — strong — body text on light, solid idle on bright surfaces.

name: color/yellow/75
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 75 — secondary text on light.

name: color/yellow/100
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 100 — mid-tone — borders, disabled fills.

name: color/yellow/125
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 125 — primary fill on dark surfaces.

name: color/yellow/150
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 150 — soft border, disabled text.

name: color/yellow/175
description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 175 — near-light tint.

description: Brand-extension hue (yellow). Used in vision-mode overrides for daltonism-safe warning. Shade 190 — tint — subtle background hue.
